steps.title: Spot the conflict
steps.content: Drivers view the current toll as too high.

steps.title: Match the expected reaction
steps.content:
Receptive to (favorable toward) works here—these drivers wouldn't welcome a proposal to increase the toll.

The other options either miss the issue (apprised of means informed, not responding), contradict what we'd expect (incensed by suggests they would be angry, the opposite of unlikely to be), or don't fit grammatically.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
